bead.title: Final release infrastructure verification
bead.description: Final audit bead for docs/release/release-infrastructure-plan.md. Do not add new product scope. Verify the release, Docker, Helm, README, microsite, reproducible test infrastructure, and runbook beads are complete and internally consistent. In-scope files: docs/release/release-infrastructure-plan.md, README.md, .github/workflows/**, charts/heimq/**, site/**, justfile or Makefile, rust-toolchain.toml, Dockerfile. Out of scope: protocol/storage behavior changes. If a required item is incomplete, leave this bead open and add or update child beads rather than papering over the gap.
bead.acceptance:
1. `ddx bead status` shows no open/proposed child beads under `heimq-46fe0670` except this final audit.
2. `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes.
3. `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes.
4. `cargo test --workspace --all-targets` passes.
5. `helm lint charts/heimq`, `helm template heimq charts/heimq`, and `helm package charts/heimq` pass.
6. `docker build -t heimq:local .` passes.
7. README.md, site/, Docker workflow, Helm chart, and release workflow all agree on repository/image/version mapping.
